note: FIRST fix all year found by GROUND-TRUTH scoring of a predicate rather than win/loss correlation. EX_EVOLUTION_ANCESTORS transitively collects every ancestor of any ex (105 names); basics evolving into BOTH ex and non-ex lines assert ex pressure on sight. Dunsparce (core of the non-ex attacker deck, our largest matchup, weight 0.289) triggered wall_mode against a deck with no ex threat, stalling the mill clock (consistent with exp067: losses run 3.7 fewer of our turns). 1-line diff. CRITICAL context: a measurement bug was found the same day -- eval_both_bands only selects the CRN harness when '--crn' is in sys.argv, so every earlier same-day measurement was silently UNPAIRED; the broken harness both invented a fake +0.0358 (ready_now+bench_strict, actually +-0.0000) and BURIED this real signal (measured +0.0067, actually +0.0300 at n=200 / +0.0132 at n=600). Built artifact verified byte-equivalent in behaviour to the measured agent (4 matchups x100, exact match); smoke 30 games/3179 actions 0 err, max action 0.002s.
